env.name: IB_ACCOUNT_ID
env.description: Default brokerage account ID (auto-detected if blank)

env.name: IB_SSL_VERIFY
env.description: Verify gateway SSL certificates (false for self-signed)

setup.blurb: Portfolio monitoring, market data, and order management via the IB Client Portal Gateway. 21 tools, triple order safety, token-efficient output.
setup.help_text: Download and run the IB Client Portal Gateway, then authenticate by opening its URL in a browser. This MCP connects to the already-authenticated gateway — your IB credentials never touch the MCP process.

fields.label: Gateway URL
fields.help: URL where Client Portal Gateway is running

fields.label: Verify SSL
fields.help: Set false for the gateway's default self-signed certificate

fields.label: Enable Trading
fields.help: Place, modify, cancel orders. Real money operations.

prerequisites: IB Client Portal Gateway running and authenticated

highlights.text: Portfolio — positions, P&L, cash balances, account summary
Market data — real-time quotes, historical bars, contract search
Scanners — market scanner with 50+ IB parameter types
Triple safety — env gate, confirm gate, and order preview
Orders — place, modify, cancel with what-if preview
Gateway isolation — IB credentials never touch the MCP

readme:
### What it does

Interactive Brokers MCP connects your AI agent to the IB Client Portal Gateway, giving access to portfolio data, real-time market quotes, historical bars, contract search, market scanners, and full order management across 21 tools.

Your agent can check positions, scan for trading opportunities, preview an order's margin impact, and execute trades — all without leaving the conversation.

### Gateway architecture

This MCP never sees your IB credentials. You authenticate to the Client Portal Gateway via a browser, and the MCP communicates with the already-authenticated gateway over its local REST API. The gateway handles session management, re-authentication, and credential storage independently.

### Token efficiency

IB API responses are deeply nested with hundreds of fields per position or contract. Each tool includes a concise formatter that extracts only actionable fields — ticker, quantity, P&L, market value — dropping internal IDs and raw exchange metadata. A portfolio summary returns ~300 tokens instead of ~2,000.

### Safety model

Order operations use triple-gated safety:

- **Environment gate** — `IB_WRITE_ENABLED` must be `true` to unlock any order tool
- **Confirm gate** — each order tool requires `confirm: true` per call
- **Order preview** — `ib_order_preview` shows margin impact, commission, and warnings before execution

Read operations (portfolio, quotes, scanners) work immediately with no gates.

scenarios.label: Morning portfolio review
scenarios.body: Check authentication status, pull portfolio summary and P&L, review cash balances across accounts, and flag any positions with significant overnight moves.

scenarios.label: Research and preview a trade
scenarios.body: Search for a contract by symbol, fetch real-time quotes and historical bars, run a market scanner for related instruments, then preview the order's margin impact before deciding whether to execute.

scenarios.label: Monitor and manage open orders
scenarios.body: List all open orders with their fill status, check recent trades for execution prices, and modify or cancel pending orders that have drifted from the intended entry.

certification.security_notes: Gateway isolation — IB credentials managed by gateway, never exposed to MCP process. Triple order safety: env gate (IB_WRITE_ENABLED), confirm gate (per-tool parameter), and order preview (what-if). Bearer auth for HTTP transport. Credential scrubbing on all error paths.
